A blue lower-third graphic overlays the bottom of the frame, partially obscuring the building's columns. White Russian text reads "Обстановка накаляется" above "КНДР грозит ударить по Южной Корее". The blue lower-third graphic remains at the bottom.

The flags continue waving against the white tiled wall. The central white flag twists and unfurls in the wind, alternating between showing its face and side. The red flag on the left displays a yellow star emblem, while the red flag on the right shows white text. The blue news banner with Russian text remains fixed at the bottom.

The blue lower-third graphic disappears. The scene cuts to an outdoor protest where three white effigies mounted on wooden crosses burn fiercely. Flames and smoke rise from the figures. In the background, a crowd of people holds signs with Korean text.
